definition:
SELECT sync_status,
    triggered_by,
    count(*) AS rows,
    min(triggered_at) AS oldest_pending,
    max(triggered_at) AS newest
   FROM attio_sync_queue
  GROUP BY sync_status, triggered_by
  ORDER BY sync_status, triggered_by;

WITH market AS (
         SELECT ( SELECT interactions.primary_objection
                   FROM interactions
                  GROUP BY interactions.primary_objection
                  ORDER BY (count(*)) DESC
                 LIMIT 1) AS top_objection,
            ( SELECT interactions.dominant_unresolved_belief
                   FROM interactions
                  GROUP BY interactions.dominant_unresolved_belief
                  ORDER BY (count(*)) DESC
                 LIMIT 1) AS top_belief,
            ( SELECT interactions.activation_event
                   FROM interactions
                  GROUP BY interactions.activation_event
                  ORDER BY (count(*)) DESC
                 LIMIT 1) AS top_activation_event
        ), pipeline AS (
         SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE (commercial_outcomes.outcome_type = 'exec_meeting'::text)) AS exec_meetings,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE (commercial_outcomes.outcome_type = 'irr_started'::text)) AS irrs_started,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE (commercial_outcomes.outcome_type = 'membership_discussion'::text)) AS membership_discussions,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE (commercial_outcomes.outcome_type = 'membership_closed'::text)) AS memberships_closed
           FROM commercial_outcomes
          WHERE (commercial_outcomes.occurred_at > (now() - '90 days'::interval))
        ), current_campaign AS (
         SELECT b.belief_statement AS current_belief,
            o.objection_statement AS current_objection,
            ae.event_type AS current_activation_event,
            c.decision_type AS current_decision_type,
            c.campaign_id
           FROM (((campaigns c
             LEFT JOIN beliefs b ON ((b.belief_id = c.belief_id)))
             LEFT JOIN objections o ON ((o.objection_id = c.objection_id)))
             LEFT JOIN activation_events ae ON ((ae.activation_event_id = c.activation_event_id)))
          WHERE (c.status = 'active'::text)
          ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
         LIMIT 1
        )
 SELECT m.top_belief AS market_most_common_unresolved_belief,
    m.top_objection AS market_most_common_objection,
    m.top_activation_event AS market_most_common_activation_event,
    p.exec_meetings AS pipeline_executive_meetings,
    p.irrs_started AS pipeline_irrs_started,
    p.membership_discussions AS pipeline_membership_discussions,
    p.memberships_closed AS pipeline_memberships_closed,
    cc.current_belief AS campaign_current_belief,
    cc.current_objection AS campaign_current_objection,
    cc.current_activation_event AS campaign_current_activation_event,
    cc.current_decision_type AS campaign_current_decision_type
   FROM market m,
    (pipeline p
     LEFT JOIN current_campaign cc ON (true));

WITH last_completed AS (
         SELECT j.jobid,
            j.jobname,
            j.schedule,
            j.active,
            ( SELECT d.status
                   FROM cron.job_run_details d
                  WHERE ((d.jobid = j.jobid) AND (d.status = ANY (ARRAY['succeeded'::text, 'failed'::text])))
                  ORDER BY d.start_time DESC
                 LIMIT 1) AS last_status,
            ( SELECT d.start_time
                   FROM cron.job_run_details d
                  WHERE ((d.jobid = j.jobid) AND (d.status = ANY (ARRAY['succeeded'::text, 'failed'::text])))
                  ORDER BY d.start_time DESC
                 LIMIT 1) AS last_run,
            ( SELECT count(*) AS count
                   FROM cron.job_run_details d
                  WHERE ((d.jobid = j.jobid) AND (d.start_time > (now() - '24:00:00'::interval)) AND (d.status = 'failed'::text))) AS failures_24h,
            ( SELECT count(*) AS count
                   FROM cron.job_run_details d
                  WHERE ((d.jobid = j.jobid) AND (d.start_time > (now() - '24:00:00'::interval)) AND (d.status = ANY (ARRAY['succeeded'::text, 'failed'::text])))) AS runs_24h
           FROM cron.job j
          WHERE (j.active = true)
        )
 SELECT jobid,
    jobname,
    schedule,
    last_status,
    last_run,
    failures_24h,
    runs_24h,
        CASE
            WHEN ((last_run IS NULL) AND (runs_24h = 0)) THEN 'no_recent_runs'::text
            WHEN (last_status = 'failed'::text) THEN 'failing'::text
            WHEN ((runs_24h > 0) AND (((failures_24h)::numeric / (runs_24h)::numeric) > 0.5)) THEN 'flaky'::text
            WHEN ((last_run < (now() - '01:30:00'::interval)) AND (schedule ~ '^\*/[0-9]+ \* \* \* \*$'::text)) THEN 'stalled_minutely'::text
            WHEN ((last_run < (now() - '03:00:00'::interval)) AND (schedule ~ '^[0-9]+ \* \* \* \*$'::text)) THEN 'stalled_hourly'::text
            ELSE 'healthy'::text
        END AS health
   FROM last_completed;

SELECT id,
    original_full_name,
    original_company,
    redirect_name,
    redirect_email,
    detected_at,
    note,
    (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (now() - detected_at)) / (86400)::numeric) AS days_pending
   FROM departed_employee_redirects d
  WHERE ((actioned_at IS NULL) AND ((redirect_name IS NOT NULL) OR (redirect_email IS NOT NULL)))
  ORDER BY detected_at DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (check_name) check_name,
    severity,
    affected_count,
    status,
    detail,
    checked_at,
    remediated_at,
    remediated_count
   FROM pipeline_health_log
  ORDER BY check_name, checked_at DESC;

SELECT j.jobname,
    j.schedule,
    j.active,
    max(r.end_time) AS last_ran,
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (r.status = 'failed'::text) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS failures_7d,
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (r.status = 'succeeded'::text) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS successes_7d,
        CASE
            WHEN (max(r.end_time) IS NULL) THEN 'never_run'::text
            WHEN ((max(r.end_time) < (now() - '02:00:00'::interval)) AND (j.schedule ~~ '*/1%'::text)) THEN 'silent'::text
            WHEN ((max(r.end_time) < (now() - '00:30:00'::interval)) AND ((j.schedule ~~ '*/5%'::text) OR (j.schedule ~~ '*/15%'::text))) THEN 'silent'::text
            WHEN ((max(r.end_time) < (now() - '02:00:00'::interval)) AND (j.jobname ~~ '%-15min%'::text)) THEN 'silent'::text
            ELSE 'ok'::text
        END AS health_status
   FROM (cron.job j
     LEFT JOIN cron.job_run_details r ON (((r.jobid = j.jobid) AND (r.start_time > (now() - '7 days'::interval)))))
  GROUP BY j.jobid, j.jobname, j.schedule, j.active
  ORDER BY
        CASE
            WHEN (max(r.end_time) IS NULL) THEN 'never_run'::text
            WHEN ((max(r.end_time) < (now() - '02:00:00'::interval)) AND (j.schedule ~~ '*/1%'::text)) THEN 'silent'::text
            WHEN ((max(r.end_time) < (now() - '00:30:00'::interval)) AND ((j.schedule ~~ '*/5%'::text) OR (j.schedule ~~ '*/15%'::text))) THEN 'silent'::text
            WHEN ((max(r.end_time) < (now() - '02:00:00'::interval)) AND (j.jobname ~~ '%-15min%'::text)) THEN 'silent'::text
            ELSE 'ok'::text
        END DESC, (max(r.end_time)) DESC;

SELECT ((COALESCE(sum(amount_cents) FILTER (WHERE ((purchased_at >= '2026-05-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone) AND (purchased_at < '2026-06-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone))), (0)::bigint))::numeric / 100.0) AS may_revenue_usd,
    ((150000)::numeric / 100.0) AS may_target_usd,
    ((COALESCE(sum(amount_cents) FILTER (WHERE ((purchased_at >= '2026-05-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone) AND (purchased_at < '2026-06-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone))), (0)::bigint))::numeric / 1500.0) AS pct_to_target,
    ((COALESCE(sum(amount_cents), (0)::bigint))::numeric / 100.0) AS lifetime_revenue_usd,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE ((purchased_at >= '2026-05-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone) AND (purchased_at < '2026-06-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone))) AS may_orders,
    count(*) AS lifetime_orders,
    ((COALESCE(sum(amount_cents) FILTER (WHERE (purchased_at >= (now() - '7 days'::interval))), (0)::bigint))::numeric / 100.0) AS last_7d_revenue_usd,
    ((COALESCE(sum(amount_cents) FILTER (WHERE (purchased_at >= (now() - '30 days'::interval))), (0)::bigint))::numeric / 100.0) AS last_30d_revenue_usd,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE (purchased_at >= (now() - '7 days'::interval))) AS last_7d_orders,
    (GREATEST((0)::numeric, (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (('2026-06-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone)::timestamp with time zone - now())) / (86400)::numeric)))::integer AS days_remaining_to_may31,
        CASE
            WHEN ('2026-06-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone > now()) THEN (GREATEST((0)::numeric, (1500.0 - ((COALESCE(sum(amount_cents) FILTER (WHERE ((purchased_at >= '2026-05-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone) AND (purchased_at < '2026-06-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone))), (0)::bigint))::numeric / 100.0))) / GREATEST((1)::numeric, (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (('2026-06-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone)::timestamp with time zone - now())) / (86400)::numeric)))
            ELSE NULL::numeric
        END AS required_daily_run_rate_usd
   FROM orders
  WHERE ((order_status = 'completed'::text) AND (refunded_at IS NULL));

SELECT check_name,
    severity,
    affected_count,
    status,
    detail,
    checked_at,
    remediated_at,
    remediated_count,
        CASE
            WHEN ((status = ANY (ARRAY['critical'::text, 'degraded'::text])) AND (severity = 'critical'::text)) THEN 1
            WHEN ((status = 'degraded'::text) AND (severity = 'warning'::text)) THEN 2
            WHEN (status = 'manual_required'::text) THEN 3
            ELSE 4
        END AS sort_order
   FROM pipeline_health_current
  ORDER BY
        CASE
            WHEN ((status = ANY (ARRAY['critical'::text, 'degraded'::text])) AND (severity = 'critical'::text)) THEN 1
            WHEN ((status = 'degraded'::text) AND (severity = 'warning'::text)) THEN 2
            WHEN (status = 'manual_required'::text) THEN 3
            ELSE 4
        END, check_name;

SELECT (date_trunc('day'::text, (purchased_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'::text)))::date AS day,
    count(*) AS orders,
    ((COALESCE(sum(amount_cents), (0)::bigint))::numeric / 100.0) AS revenue_usd,
    array_agg(DISTINCT product_slug) FILTER (WHERE (product_slug IS NOT NULL)) AS products
   FROM orders
  WHERE ((order_status = 'completed'::text) AND (refunded_at IS NULL))
  GROUP BY ((date_trunc('day'::text, (purchased_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'::text)))::date)
  ORDER BY ((date_trunc('day'::text, (purchased_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'::text)))::date) DESC;
